scenarios.label: Suspicious NetFlow/IPFIX run
scenarios.description: A sample network-flow file where one machine talks to the same destination at very regular intervals. One row is skipped because it uses an unsupported protocol.

scenarios.label: Low-signal Zeek conn.log run
scenarios.description: A short Zeek example with only a little evidence. It still scores, but the result is much less convincing than the suspicious sample.

scenarios.label: Messy NetFlow/IPFIX run
scenarios.description: A small messy input that shows how the system handles incomplete or unsupported rows without failing silently.
